case_title: CARLOS NEIRA VS. PNC BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED COPIES OF CHALLENGE TO VENUE MAILED TO PLAINTIFF FILED BY DEFENDANT PNC BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TO PLAINTIFF NEIRA, CARLOS
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY NEIRA, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT PNC BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $125) SERVED SEP-30-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PNC BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
